name: Mayflies
overview: A friendship forged between James and Tully in a small Scottish town in 1986. One weekend, they make a vow to each other to go at life differently. But then, 30 years on, half a life away, the phone rings. Tully has the worst kind of news.

trailers.title: Martin Compston Talks About Playing Jimmy | Mayflies | BBC Scotland
Tony Curran Talks About Playing Tully | Mayflies | BBC Scotland
